title: Nectar Medley Tart
description: A sweet and tangy tart made with nectar, medley, and date. Perfect for a dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: Nectar
ingredients.notes: honey or maple syrup as substitute

ingredients.name: Medley
ingredients.notes: any combination of nuts, seeds, and dried fruits

instructions: Roll out the dough and place in a tart pan.
Arrange dates in a pattern on the dough.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
